sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105239" key="tri/sma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρίσμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n105239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τριγμός</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">creaking</tr_> of olive plants rubbing together, Sch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3p.78Dind.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
